programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Devil in Suburbia
programme.desc: Amina and Sarah Said long to live the lives of typical American teenagers, but when they push back against the rules of their traditionalist father, tensions simmer inside the family and come to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: Devil in Suburbia
programme.desc: In small-town upstate New York, a young mother loses her five-year old son whos battled a medical condition that has plagued him since birth; doctors claim his death is not from a natural cause, and investigators soon suspect foul play.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A protective grandfather is found beaten to death on the side of the road. After an investigation begins, news of a recent incident involving a birthday gift leads Demery to the most unexpected of killers.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In 1970s Detroit, a murder rocks an African-American neighbourhood. Police think theyve got the killers - but it will take 47 years for the truth to emerge.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Two men had been best friends since growing up together in California. What caused their relationship to break down in a devastating and bloody way?

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: 19-year-old Logan Schiendelman vanishes after a night out. When authorities find no evidence of foul play, they are forced to examine his familys controversial past.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: When transgender teen Sage Smith goes missing, the investigation turns up evidence that forces detectives to look closer into Sages inner circle.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander; she fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: He Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: The heart-stopping accounts from people sharing their homes with loved ones, who become killers.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: Dalhart, Texas, 2017. Joel Frazier is the proud father of two former rodeo queens, Camie and Jamie Frazier. Suddenly he goes missing. The town rumour mill is busy, and the hostility between the women in his life is mounting, but no one can find Joel.

programme.title: The Murder of Gabby Petito: A Faking It Special
programme.desc: Experts in body language, linguistics and forensic psychology are followed as they examine footage and interviews of individuals linked to the murder of Gabby Petito by her fiance Brian Laundrie.

programme.title: A Killer Among Friends
programme.desc: A gunman kills a University of Kentucky football player at his birthday party. Despite a house full of witnesses, no one saw the shooter. As police investigate, suspicion closes in on his closest friends who were there that night.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A mother awakes to find her two sons with their throats cut; their aunts boyfriend confesses to his mother, and she wears a wire to capture her son; as he admits his guilt, its clear how a psychopathic rage led to violence.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.sub-title: Make Sure You Get My Good Side
programme.desc: A road rage incident turns deadly as an elderly man is beaten to death by a teenager who claims he was acting in self-defense; detectives not only find holes in his story but uncover that he is a remorseless and manipulative psychopath.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: Trapped in a House of Torture
programme.desc: Tammy Moores loyalty to her mother, Marie, is absolute; when police arrest Marie for murder, Tammy lies to protect her; a look back at the horrific events of her youth forces Tammy to see her mother in a new, terrifying light.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: My Brother Let the Evil In
programme.desc: Christina Thomas believes her brother, John, the first time he nearly kills a woman; she forgives him when he murders another; but when it happens again, she wonders why she trusted him and how she missed the signs he was really devil in disguise.

programme.title: Evil Online
programme.desc: High school student Brandon Wentzell falls for Clarissa Chistiakov online. However, the course of virtual love doesnt run smooth as the past collides with a toxic present.

programme.title: Evil Online
programme.desc: Beverly Carter is a 50-year-old internet savvy real-estate agent. But when she goes to meet a prospective buyer at a remote house, she never returns.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Summit
programme.desc: Ben Shephard presents the thrilling reality series where 14 ordinary Brits climb one of New Zealands highest peaks to win a share of 200,000 pounds. The climb and the stakes get ever higher as just seven of the original 14 climbers remain - as game-player Dockers tries to enlist fellow climbers into a secret group to try to oust his biggest threats, trust becomes an issue when some chocolate goes missing and Charlett accuses the others of lying.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: A daily delivery of bespoke Mindfulness content designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Ant and Decs Limitless Win
programme.desc: Ant and Dec return with their never-ending money ladder and a limitless cash prize - first up are husband-and-wife team Ricky and Manisha, who set their sights on a six-figure sum to fund a dream family holiday and some ambitious house renovations. Manisha has been compiling her very own Limitless Win spreadsheet packed full of facts and figures, and now she and Ricky try to translate all that homework into serious cash by winning truly life-changing money and leaving a legacy for their kids.

programme.title: Celebrity Lingo
programme.desc: Adil Ray hosts the game of words as Coronation Street stars Lucy Fallon, Julia Goulding, Jack P Shepherd and Colson Smith go head-to-head in a battle to win big money for charity.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and team set out to demonstrate the dos and donts of how to create a stylish contemporary garden. Inspired by the idea of creating outside rooms in your garden, Alan creates a contemporary garden complete with outside gym, kitchen, lounge, office and even a floral hallway for a family that has turned personal struggles into a thriving charity. Helping him create the super cool garden, despite the rain, are Katie Rushworth and David Domoney.

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Joining Alan at Manor Farm are Hannah Waddingham, Dame Mary Berry, and Michael Praed to provide the chat - Camilla Bassett-Smith blows the trumpet for some award-winning plants that include ones that have won the Award of Garden Merit, Jaega Wise looks at the ever-growing trend of pastry stouts that include a Walnut Whirl and a tiramisu-flavoured stout, and we shine a light on the traditional skill of horse logging.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news.

programme.title: James Martins Saturday Morning
programme.desc: James is back in the kitchen and cooking up a feast of delicious food for comedian Alan Davies, enjoying a dish from chef Sami Tamimi, and learning all about beans with gardener David Domoney.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news.

programme.title: UEFA Womens European Qualifiers LIVE
programme.desc: Seema Jaswal presents coverage as Englands Lionesses play Iceland at the City Ground, the home of Nottingham Forest, and continue their 2027 FIFA Womens World Cup qualifying campaign - England are also in a group with Spain and Ukraine as they look to qualify for the World Cup in Brazil in 2027, and only the winners of the group qualify automatically with the team in second place having to go through playoffs.

programme.title: Tipping Point: Best Ever Finals
programme.desc: Looking back at some of the most dramatic end games in Tipping History, including agonising trades and jackpot counters teetering on the edge.

programme.title: Mens Six Nations LIVE
programme.desc: Englands 12-game winning streak feels like a distant memory after crushing defeats to Scotland and Ireland which have scuppered their 2026 Guinness Six Nations title aspirations - now Steve Borthwicks side travel to Rome with a point to prove as they face an improving Italy side who have already beaten Scotland and given Ireland a scare in Dublin. Italy have never beaten England.

programme.title: Britains Got Talent
programme.desc: Following the search for Britains next best talent act. The show features singers, dancers, comedians, variety, and unusual talents of all kinds as they compete for a cash prize and a chance to appear at the Royal Variety Performance.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Lee Mack presents the game show where the questions arent about general knowledge but logic, brainpower and common sense. 100 contestants begin each edition, wholl face the final question, which only 1 per cent of the population can get right.

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show
programme.desc: Jonathan is joined for this edition by one of Hollywoods best-loved and most enduring actors - Kurt Russell - legendary Talking Heads songwriter and frontman David Byrne, the hilarious comedian Sara Pascoe, star of the much-anticipated Peaky Blinders film Tim Roth, The Sky at Night host and space scientist Dame Maggie Aderin, and the hugely popular Stick Season singer Noah Kahan, with over 15 billion streams worldwide, who performs in the studio.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news.

programme.title: Itll Be Alright on the Night
programme.desc: Tom Allen celebrates TV chaos with behind-the-scenes cock-ups and broadcast bloopers featuring the nations favourite TV shows and stars - expect unseen outtakes from TVs finest dramas, comedies and entertainment programmes alongside on-air mishaps from the world of news, daytime TV and sport. Featuring Pedro Pascal, Jeremy Clarkson, Mel Giedroyc, Martin Lewis, Stephen Mulhern, James Martin, Prue Leith and more, the cock-ups include a live football interview being ruined by a rogue sprinkler.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Born Without Trace
programme.desc: Foundlings are people who were abandoned as babies, often in the first hours and days of their lives. Born without a trace, they have had no way to unlock the secrets of their past. By combining new DNA technology with painstaking detective work, the mysteries of people with unknown beginnings who are desperate for answers can now be solved. Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell, the team behind `Long Lost Family use an extraordinary new technique to try and identify birth families and find answers for people who have spent decades trying to find out where they came from.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: A daily delivery of bespoke Mindfulness content designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: MandS: Dress the Nation
programme.desc: Its the grand final as the three remaining designers go head-to-head in their biggest challenge yet by creating their own full collections and showcasing their designs in a star-studded catwalk event - they need to impress not only MandS lead designers in this finale, but also three fashion experts in the form of David Gandy, Jodie Kidd, and Marco Capaldo. Only one can be crowned champion and win a life-changing prize: to work alongside Britains best-loved retailer MandS.

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James adventure brings him over the border into North Wales, where hes joined by chef Stephen Terry for this leg of his journey. Their first stop is the grand Pale Hall, where head chef Gareth Stevenson is cooking up a real treat - Moroccan-inspired Welsh lamb. James offers his own variation of Welsh lamb in the grounds of the hall, serving with gnocchi and vegetables. Next, one of James boyhood dreams comes true as he has the ultimate falconry experience.

programme.title: James Martins Saturday Morning
programme.desc: James is back in the kitchen and cooking up a feast of delicious food for comedian Alan Davies, enjoying a dish from chef Sami Tamimi, and learning all about beans with gardener David Domoney.

programme.title: Jimmy and Shivis Farmhouse Breakfast
programme.desc: Jimmy and Shivi are joined in the kitchen by cake maker to the stars Juliet Sear for cooking, chat and craft - Shivi cooks kimchi pancakes for breakfast, theres a lesson in sculpting clay chicken ornaments with crafter Jade Berry and a sangria recipe with a twist, and Jimmy visits a giant and historic Spanish restaurant in Florida. Elsewhere, Shivi gets a beekeeping lesson and experiences the real good life at a city back garden smallholding.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news.

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Joining Alan at Manor Farm are TVs biggest Taskmaster Alan Davies and wildlife enthusiast Michaela Strachan to provide the chat alongside Annabelle Apsion and Cliff Parisi, Poplars favourite duo, as they chat about whats next for Fred and Violet - we also meet a couple who have spent the past five years setting up a hedgehog hospital in their back garden and sample some female-owned beverages that are sure to raise spirits on a spring morning.

programme.title: Fletchers Family Farm
programme.desc: Its a big week for the Fletchers - its been over a year since the fire in the farmhouse caused so much smoke damage that their home was inhabitable, and the day has now finally arrived for a clear-out and renovation work to begin - elsewhere, some new hens arrive for cockerel Daniel, Milo gets a lesson in the birds and the bees as Kelvin explains tupping, and Liz and Kelvin enjoy a day off the farm as they visit another farm in Cheshire to unearth a new passion for homegrown vegetables.

programme.title: Ainsleys Taste of the Bahamas
programme.desc: Ainsley celebrates the Bahamas festival spirit with art, food, and Junkanoo flair at Baha Mar, has a fritto misto masterclass with chef Scott Conant, and rustles up barbecue jerk-spiced chicken in a sweet guava glaze.

programme.title: Talking Royals
programme.desc: A round-up of royal news with expert analysis from ITV News Royal Editor Chris Ship, ITV News royal expert Lizzie Robinson and a host of guests.

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James British adventure has crossed over the Irish sea to Northern Ireland, where he is joined by his great pal and famous local chef, Paul Rankin. Their first port of call is the Giants Causeway, where James settles right in and cooks up a fish stew for the crowds of tourists. Paul goes in search of Irish gold and finds it in the form of rapeseed at the Kane family farm in Limavady.

programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Theres drama, nail-biting tension, and Jeremy Clarkson on hand to give away one million pounds - find out if anyone has got what it takes to head home as a millionaire.

programme.desc: The first episode of a chilling mystery drama. Impassive headmaster Michael Polly surveys a school rugby pitch as the First XV of St Bartholomews, his team, snatches victory from the jaws of defeat - he arrives home afterwards with daughter Alana to find no sign of his wife Sarah, a music teacher at the school.

programme.title: Faked: Hunting My Online Predator
programme.desc: In this powerful true story, three women, strangers living hundreds of miles apart, are forced to take matters into their own hands after finding themselves portrayed as offering sexual services in faked profiles. This documentary for the BAFTA-winning ITV Exposure strand follows their five-year hunt for answers and for justice as the women unravel something far bigger than they could have imagined: a network of hundreds of unaware victims and one man at its heart.

programme.desc: Just like every year for Halloween, Fred refuses to leave the house. He believes that no mysteries will be solved on that day and that nothing will go as planned.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex
programme.desc: The gang are in the mood to party as Roman throws an event and everyone is invited, but Dan and Ella arent in any mood to celebrate as Dan went on a stag do and didnt have much contact with Ella.

programme.desc: Bombshell news sends shockwaves through the Essex crew on a night out. Elsewhere, Dan and Ella are happier than ever and Junaid and Joe are going from strength to strength. programme.title: Agatha Christies Marple
programme.desc: Miss Marple helps a family friend seek refuge at a country pile known as Greenshaws Folly, but a sinister shadow soon begins to fall over the strange old buildings various inhabitants. As Miss Marple uncovers dark, deadly secrets from the past, a dangerous storm is gathering and the threat of murder begins to strike once more.

programme.title: Agatha Christies Poirot
programme.sub-title: The Theft of the Royal Ruby
programme.desc: Poirot prepares to spend a quiet Christmas on his own with a box of chocolates, but he has to give up his plans when the British government asks for his urgent help. Prince Farouk, a young member of the Egyptian royal family visiting London, has lost a famous ruby, and this is deemed to be a matter of national security.

programme.title: ITV Racing Live LIVE
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents coverage of racing from Sandown and Wolverhampton - the feature meeting is at Sandown where the Imperial Cup is the highlight and always a competitive handicap hurdle. Theres also a highly competitive Novices Handicap Chase for horses that wont be in action at the 2024 Cheltenham Festival and good Flat racing from Wolverhampton too - analysis comes from Tom Scudamore and Adele Mulrennan, reporting from Oli Bell and Matt Chapman, and commentary from Richard Hoiles.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Gated estate Challis Court is a tight-knit community for retired police officers, but when a new arrival is found dead, the other residents regard the murder as an affront. Barnaby realizes that the killer is likely an ex-police officer.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage boy is found in a reservoir in a remote rural town, DCI Vera Stanhope must scrutinise the fractured relationships of the surrounding community to find his killer.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: An insight into the NHS. The first episode kicks off during the morning rush hour, meeting workers who set off on their daily commute but find themselves fighting for their lives in the skilful hands of the AandE team. Two cyclists arrive with serious head injuries. IT analyst Christopher hit a log on his way to work, and concerns are raised when scans show a bleed on his brain.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A quarter of all patients treated in Kings AandE are children, and this episode follows some of their stories for the first time, as well as one of AandEs youngest and newest recruits, 27-year-old emergency medicine trainee Matt. Hes the first member of his family to go to university and pursue a career in medicine.

programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man whos crashed his motorbike, a boy with chest pains and a family history of heart problems, a woman with abdominal pain and a baby who has a worrying cough.

Moving on up to Sussex, they go behind the scenes at one of Britains most famous bike shops, and find in its dark corners and dusty attics, two extraordinary hidden gems.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: The investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms crack federal cases involving drugs, arson and weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicologists link suspicious deaths to the lethal administration of poison after studying blood and tissue samples.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: After two serial bank robbers escape from police custody, FBI agents familiar with the bandits believe that they would attempt a grand-scale heist.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: On October 2, 1987, a Boston police officer responding to a domestic disturbance call was fatally wounded. Local authorities launched a citywide manhunt, but were only able to find the fingerprints of the chief suspect.

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: Bestselling author, Helen Bailey, was a wealthy widow. After finding love again with Ian Stewart she vanished. He helps in the search - but was it a cover-up?

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In February 1988, a record store clerk was fatally shot in his van. After discovering a night deposit bag with thousands of dollars in the vehicle, police knew that robbery was not the motive, and began to investigate other possibilities.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a group of political extremists twice robbed a bank in Washington, using home-made bombs and military precision to escape. The FBI learned that the robbers were part of a shadowy organisation.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A man returned to his Memphis home and discovered that his wife was missing. The husband began to receive ransom calls, but FBI agents noticed that one neighbour had a very good rapport with the kidnapper.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: A young mother is viciously gunned down on Virginias Chincoteague Island.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: The murder of a radio host uncovers a tale of love and deceit.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: The murder of a young entrepreneur triggers a labyrinthine investigation.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: The former mayor of Potowan Point, Ohio, turns up dead in his hunting cabin. Detective Ryan Allar and his team begin the search to figure out if this is political retaliation or something more personal, what they find hits a little too close to home.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: A home health care aides body floats in a rural Connecticut creek. Detective Garritt Kelly joins the investigation to bring justice to a community gripped by fear.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: When a couple are killed in their bedroom in a quiet Maryland town, Detective Joe Bellino wonders if the answer lies with their daughter, who bore witness to both murders.

programme.title: A Killers Mistake
programme.desc: Experts examine and discuss the key mistakes made within high-profile murder cases that then led to the eventual arrest of the culprits.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: People recount their horrifying true stories about living side-by-side with sociopathic friends or family who go on to commit heinous crimes.

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: Flying ace Russell Williams rose to the highest ranks of the military whilst leading a shocking double life as a rapist and murderer. Finding out how the British-born Colonel gave himself away as one of Canadas most feared and dangerous criminals.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.sub-title: The Whole Building is Full of Snakes!
programme.desc: Ben Renick is building an empire as a world-renowned breeder of exotic snakes; he has fame, fortune and a young family to share it with, but little does he know, someone he loves is hatching a venomous plot.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Family comes first to grandparents Ron and Kay Wilkson, though they may not have much money, their growing brood always knows how to make their own fun. However, something evil is prowling close to home and not everyone will make it out alive.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In Alexandria, Va, Nancy Dunning, Ronald Kirby and Ruthanne Lodato are all fatally shot in broad daylight by a gunman knocking at the front door. Detectives attempt to use security footage to track down the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: On March 27 2015, Tierra Hall says goodbye to her mother for the last time; 24 hours later, the teenagers dead body is discovered outside an abandoned house.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: In December 1910, the murder of three City of London Police officers and the wounding of two others was, and continues to be, one of the largest multiple murders of police officers on duty carried out in Great Britain.

programme.title: The New Chicago Mob
programme.desc: Exploring the rise of Chicagos notorious organised crime outfit from its inception.

programme.title: The New Chicago Mob
programme.desc: Exploring the rise of Chicagos notorious organised crime outfit from its inception.

programme.title: The New Chicago Mob
programme.desc: Exploring the rise of Chicagos notorious organised crime outfit from its inception.

programme.title: Scarface: The Al Capone Story
programme.desc: In the Roaring Twenties, Al Capone ruled an empire of crime in the Windy City: gambling, prostitution, bootlegging, bribery, narcotics trafficking, robbery, protection rackets, and murder. It seemed that law enforcement couldnt touch him, until one fatal night in 1929.

programme.title: Dangerous Company
programme.desc: A couple of Kentucky blue bloods team up to form a front for their drug smuggling business. As the operation grows, so too does the paranoia and betrayal.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: The First World War took the lives of countless soldiers on the front line, but one man in Paris, too old for combat, saw this as an opportunity. Fraudster and serial killer Henri Landru targeted lonely and vulnerable women left behind by the war.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Herbert Rowse Armstrong went down in history as The Hay Poisoner. Convicted in 1922 of murdering his wife with arsenic, he was the first and only solicitor to be hanged in the UK, but questions remain as to his guilt.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Until its closure in 2016, Madame Tussauds Chamber of Horrors was one of the museums oldest and most popular attractions. And for decades, staring out at visitors was the waxwork of a notorious Victorian double killer, the murderer of a young mother and baby - a woman named Mary Pearcey. A reveal of how the troubled Pearcey began an affair with her victims husband, how she inserted herself into the familys life, and how she lured her rival to her death.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Former pro-wrestler Ivan Radocaj, known as the Croatian Giant, is ambushed and brutally murdered in the tiny Manitoba hamlet of Inwood. It looks like a robbery gone wrong, but what investigators hear over a wire tap brings a monstrous plot to light.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: In a tiny hamlet just outside the town of Bonnyville, Alberta, Canada, 58-year-old Doreen Bradley, owner and operator of a successful fast food restaurant, is found murdered in her rural home.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Fredrick Banks is an eccentric senior who loves to show off his vintage cars and wallet stuffed with cash. When he is found slain in his garage, authorities hunt for the mysterious stranger who has recently been spotted lurking in town.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: A fire engulfs the home of the Klaus family in the middle the night while everyone is asleep, and the investigators suspect that it isnt an accident. The whole case changes when the son starts seeing the spirits of his dead family.

programme.title: Murderous Minds: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Britton Tobin was a Scottish convicted serial killer and sex offender who served a whole life order at HM Prison Edinburgh for three murders committed between 1991 and 2006. Delve into the psychology of Peter to try and understand what turned him into such a cruel rapist and murderer.

programme.title: Code of Silence - Trail of Murder
programme.desc: In the late 1990s, Tommy Shea assembled the most successful gang of bank robbers in New England, but the FBI suspected they were based elsewhere.

programme.title: The Unperfect Crime
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the 1997 Loomis-Fargo armoured car heist in North Carolina and the serio-comic fates of its underdog perpetrators. who fell victim to avarice, mutual betrayals and false romantic promises.

programme.title: Gangster No. 1: The Freddie Foreman Story
programme.desc: Attached to almost every unsolved gangland murder in London over the last 50 years, Freddie Foreman is the `Godfather of Britains criminal underworld. Foreman reveals the audacious details of the heists, double crossings, shootouts, murders and betrayals he was involved in, and ultimately, what has made him `Gangster Number.1.

programme.title: The Krays: The Myth Behind the Legend
programme.desc: Rivals and other contemporaries discuss gangsters Ronnie and Reggie Kray, who ran Londons East End.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: In Norfolk, an otherwise unassuming summer evening is shaken by an armed robbery. A vehicle is stolen and innocent people are shot.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Burgess of Norwich CID has a problem as the number of home burglaries has rocketed. Looking at the evidence, officers suspect that one man is potentially responsible for a large part of the spike in residential crime.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Former pro-wrestler Ivan Radocaj, known as the Croatian Giant, is ambushed and brutally murdered in the tiny Manitoba hamlet of Inwood. It looks like a robbery gone wrong, but what investigators hear over a wire tap brings a monstrous plot to light.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: In a tiny hamlet just outside the town of Bonnyville, Alberta, Canada, 58-year-old Doreen Bradley, owner and operator of a successful fast food restaurant, is found murdered in her rural home.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Fredrick Banks is an eccentric senior who loves to show off his vintage cars and wallet stuffed with cash. When he is found slain in his garage, authorities hunt for the mysterious stranger who has recently been spotted lurking in town.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Fredrick Banks is an eccentric senior who loves to show off his vintage cars and wallet stuffed with cash. When he is found slain in his garage, authorities hunt for the mysterious stranger who has recently been spotted lurking in town.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: A fire engulfs the home of the Klaus family in the middle the night while everyone is asleep, and the investigators suspect that it isnt an accident. The whole case changes when the son starts seeing the spirits of his dead family.

programme.title: Symphony of the Seas: Underwater Wonders of Australias Ocean
programme.desc: A cinematic dive with Paul Waghorn exploring Australias reefs, marine life, and survival.

programme.title: Myths of the Congo
programme.desc: The Congo River, Africas second largest, grows from Zambia, gaining strength as it flows westward.

programme.title: Antarctica Dreaming: Wildlife on Ice
programme.desc: Antarctica Dreaming documents all major Antarctic and sub-Antarctic animals.

programme.title: Wild Alpine Rivers
programme.desc: What would happen to the mountains without water? They would turn into deserts, devoid of life and vegetation. But there are very few mountains without water on our planet.

programme.title: Wild Skagerrak
programme.desc: The strait that connects the North Sea with the Baltic, with depths of over 700 metres, is notorious for its dangerously strong currents. But currents also mean food and therefore nourishment for the large swarms of fish that inhabit the region.

programme.title: Discovering Music

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: Artworks by Gustav Klimt, Amedeo Modigliani, Pablo Picasso and Camille Pissarro are expected to fetch tens of millions of pounds at Sothebys.

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: Artworks by Boudin, Matisse, Dali and and Monet go on offer at Christies, as does Paul Gauguins Te Fare, which is expected to fetch up to £18million.

programme.title: Bregenz: Madama Butterfly
programme.desc: A performance of Puccinis opera Madama Butterfly at the Bregenz Festival in Austria.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Colonel George Peregrines comfortable life is disturbed when his wife writes a best selling raunchy novel. Is this evidence that shes having an affair?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When wealthy Prince Zawi gives surgeon Robert Sandy a diamond for saving his life, the doctor finds that his new jewel is really more of a liability than an asset.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When devoted verger Albert is forced to resign, he sets out to build a new life. But can he succeed in a modern world that has little time for his old-fashioned ways?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When sheltered young man Nicholas travels to London to compete in a fencing competition, he gets caught up in a very strange adventure.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When a timid provincial solicitor visits a smart London hotel on a business trip, he becomes embroiled in a curious case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A farmer (Pat Buttram) brings home a sideshow jar whose curious contents frighten his wife (Collin Wilcox).

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A prisoner (Edd Byrnes) convinces a fellow inmate to smuggle him out of prison in anothers coffin.

programme.title: Beach Boys: Endless Harmony
programme.desc: Documentary about the pioneering surf and harmony band featuring interviews with the surviving Boys, archive footage and a soundtrack full of hits.

programme.title: Fun in Acapulco
programme.desc: A nightclub entertainer works as a lifeguard during the day and finds ample time for romance.

programme.title: Landscape Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Pitching easels and priming canvases to find out who is the Landscape Artist of the Year. Hopeful contestants try to paint their way to a life-changing cash prize in various locations across the country.

programme.title: Peter Gabriel: Live In Athens 1987
programme.desc: A live concert performance from the great Peter Gabriel in Greeces capital city.

programme.title: Phil Collins: Going Back to Detroit
programme.desc: The former Genesis front man investigates the roots and importance of the Motown sound as he teams up with The Funk Brothers to record an album of Motown greats.

programme.title: Electric Light Orchestra: Live - The Early Years
programme.desc: A compilation of three ELO concerts: Fusion Live in London (1976), plus unreleased shows at Brunel University (1973) and Germanys Rockpalast (1974).

programme.title: Pink Floyd: P. U. L. S. E. Live at Earls Court
programme.desc: Pink Floyds final live show in 1995.

programme.title: Live from Abbey Road: The Very Best Of
programme.sub-title: Paul Simon, David Gilmour and Sheryl Crow
programme.desc: Features Dave Gilmour, Sheryl Crow and Paul Simon performing in an intimate setting.

programme.title: Live from Abbey Road: The Very Best Of
programme.sub-title: Paul Simon, David Gilmour and Sheryl Crow
programme.desc: Features Dave Gilmour, Sheryl Crow and Paul Simon performing in an intimate setting.

programme.title: Wrath of the Titans
programme.desc: Perseus enlists the aid of Queen Andromeda, Hephaestus and Poseidons son to rescue Zeus from the underworld, defeat the Titans and save mankind.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: A Fistful of Dollars
programme.desc: Sergio Leones classic about a mysterious drifters involvement with two families, the Baxters and the Rojos, in a Mexican border town. Instead of leaving town, the drifter gets caught up in the feud and plays both sides of the warring factions and gets rich in the bargain.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: To the court of the King of Qin, who seeks to rule the united country, comes Nameless, who claims to have killed three deadly assassins who were all determined to kill the King. As Nameless recounts his exploits in flashback, each time the wily King responds with his version. Is Nameless a true servant of Qin or does he have a secret agenda?

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The comic book web-slinger returns for a blockbusting sequel. Crime-fighting has cost Peter Parker his best friend and his true love Mary Jane. However, just as he quits as Spider-Man, New York comes under threat from Dr Octopus, a metal-tentacled madman. Peter has no choice but to swing back into action.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Violence has been outlawed in the politically correct regime of 2032, and the only weapons in existence are consigned to a museum, but when an escaped psychopath heads straight for the museum, the authorities decide the only effective recourse they have is to thaw out a violent, cryogenically frozen cop.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor Sullivan recruits Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old fortune. What starts out as a heist becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Life is sweet for Peter Parker, MJ loves him, her career is taking off and Spidey-mania is sweeping New York. However, when an alien parasite bonds to his suit, its not long before the good times and Spidey turn bad. While his ugly ego is taking centre stage, MJ is dumped from her Broadway show, Harry remembers Spider-Mans role in his fathers death, and Peter is consumed by revenge.

programme.title: I Am Legend
programme.desc: In the year 2012, scientists engineer a cure for cancer. Three years later, every human in New York is dead or mutated into a light-sensitive zombie by the virus that was supposed to heal. Only one man survives, virologist Robert Neville. He has two aims: find a cure for the virus and make contact with other survivors.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Violence has been outlawed in the politically correct regime of 2032, and the only weapons in existence are consigned to a museum, but when an escaped psychopath heads straight for the museum, the authorities decide the only effective recourse they have is to thaw out a violent, cryogenically frozen cop.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Mechs vs. Mutants
programme.desc: Gotham City faces catastrophe when Mr Freeze transforms Killer Croc and Bane into mega-sized mutant monsters. As the gigantic villains go on the rampage, its up to the caped crusader to cut them down to size.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: Barry B Benson is an everybee with a dream. He escapes the hive and makes contact with a human, the florist Vanessa Bloome. Enraged to discover that humans have been stealing their honey goodness, Barry sets out on a crusade that will change the ecosystem forever. Will it be for the better? A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

programme.title: Small Foot
programme.desc: Migo is a friendly Yeti who discovers something that he didnt know existed: a human. When his fellow villagers refuse to believe him, Migo embarks on an epic journey to find the mysterious creature that can put him back in good graces.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: Poppy, the optimistic leader of the trolls, and Branch, her polar opposite, embark on an adventure that takes them far beyond the only world theyve ever known.

programme.title: The Ogglies
programme.desc: Young Max meets the Ogglies, a family of green, garbage-eating creatures who live at the dump in the town of Smelliville. When a contractor plans to build a wellness temple at the dump, Max and his pal must hatch a plan to save the Ogglies home.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, finds himself on a wild outdoor adventure when his long-lost father draws him into a high-stakes heist.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of self-taught talking rats. When Maurice and the rodents meet a bookworm called Malicia, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: Open Season: Scared Silly
programme.desc: The humans and animals believe a werewolf is on the loose, so former hunter Shaw uses the opportunity to re-open the season. Boog, Elliot, and Mr Weenie have to face their fears and find the werewolf to get the season closed permanently.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: A dragon, an orphaned boy, and a mountain spirit work together as they trek through the Himalayas in search for the Rim of Heaven.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: A dragon, an orphaned boy, and a mountain spirit work together as they trek through the Himalayas in search for the Rim of Heaven.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: Teddy bear Ted seeks legal help from a young lawyer and a legendary, civil-rights attorney when the law declares him to be property and not a person.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa .5
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Disgraced FBI agents Marcus and Kevin go to bizarre lengths to catch a devious millionaire. They disguise themselves as dumb white socialites Brittany and Tiffany Wilson, the heiresses to a hotel fortune who are under threat. Gross-out comedic farce from the makers of `Scary Movie.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: A disgraced male model becomes the unwitting fall guy in an evil designers plot to assassinate a world leader.

programme.title: Zoolander 2
programme.desc: A special agent recruits former models Derek Zoolander and Hansel to save the worlds most beautiful people from a deadly plot.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his bumbling father, Detective Frank Drebin Jr. must solve a murder case to prevent Police Squad from shutting down.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A bungling bachelor becomes a last-minute babysitter. Bucks brothers three children are foisted on him when the parents are called away from home indefinitely. Although he seems to be an unsuitable guardian, Buck turns out to have an unexpected knack for parenting, but he must work hard to prove himself, especially when he needs to save his eldest niece from her unsavoury boyfriend.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: A gutsy prisoner earns the admiration of inmates and the wrath of guards by constant defiance and bids for freedom.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: While widow Aurora fends off a stream of admirers, daughter Emma learns the hard facts of married life.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: A wealthy law student and a lower-class music student meet and fall in love while at Harvard. In the face of parental disapproval, they marry and are blissfully happy, until they discover that she has a fatal disease.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A bittersweet story about a 43-year-old woman on the verge of divorce who magically travels back in time to her senior high-school years. She is able to act with the benefit of hindsight, but despite her efforts, she falls for the same boy all over again.

programme.title: The Kings Speech
programme.desc: Afflicted with a stammer, Prince Albert, the Duke of York, dreads the speaking engagements that come with being the son of King George V.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: When ex-German international and camp commandant Van Steiner suggests a match between the POWs and the Germans, it swiftly escalates into a propaganda exercise.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: A gutsy prisoner earns the admiration of inmates and the wrath of guards by constant defiance and bids for freedom.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: In Southeast Asia, a newly relocated American businessman and his family look for a safe haven during a violent political uprising.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography by Chris Kyle.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography by Chris Kyle.

programme.title: Robin and the Hoods
programme.desc: For the tenacious 11-year-old Robin and her loyal band of friends The Hoods, the patch of overgrown scrubland at the end of their cul-de-sac is a magical kingdom.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: Paul Blart takes his teenage daughter with him to Las Vegas for a security-guard expo. While there, he stumbles upon a heist and must single-handedly apprehend the crooks.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In a countryside town bordering on a magical land, a young man ventures into the realm of fairies to retrieve a fallen star in order to win the heart of his beloved.

programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: grow
programme.desc: An exuberant tale full of giant pumpkins, madcap characters and a little girl who just might be a pumpkin-growing savant. (2025, 107 mins)

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A heart-warming tale about a troubled young boy and his friendship with a captive orca whale named Willy. On bad terms with his new foster parents and set to work in an aquarium under court order, the boy turns to the whale for companionship. When he uncovers a cruel plot by its owner to kill the whale in order to claim a big insurance payout, the lad becomes determined to save Willys life and release him back into the wild.

The four are reunited when they chance across one of the abusive guards and take the chance for revenge.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Violence has been outlawed in the politically correct regime of 2032, and the only weapons in existence are consigned to a museum, but when an escaped psychopath heads straight for the museum, the authorities decide the only effective recourse they have is to thaw out a violent, cryogenically frozen cop.

programme.title: The Cinema List: British Women
programme.desc: The Cinema List spotlights trailblazing British women directors, from `Mamma Mia! to `Promising Young Woman, celebrating female filmmaking talent.

programme.title: Jackie Chans First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective is contracted to recover a stolen nuclear warhead. Hired by both the CIA and Russian intelligence, the kung-fu cop is harassed, assaulted and framed for murder as he delves into the murky world of international arms dealing.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: A mans neutrality during the American Civil War is tested by his daughters marriage and his sons capture by Union forces.

programme.title: Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Martial arts romp about a TV chef who becomes embroiled in a drug lords search for an incriminating video. The kung-fu fighting cook steps in to save an investigative journalist on the run from a gang of murderous drug dealers, resulting in a potentially fatal mix-up involving her incriminating tape of the gangsters and a childrens video.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Richard Kembles wife is murdered and he is arrested for the crime. He soon realises he has been framed, and while being transported on a prison bus, he manages to escape. On the run, he has to evade the relentless pursuit by the US Marshall, Samuel Gerard, while also avoiding everyone he knows, and finding out who the real killer is, the one-armed man who broke into their house.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A disturbed undercover cop recovering from his wifes death is teamed up with a detective with a stable family background to crack an underground drug ring. The line between duty and off-duty begins to blur, however, when the daughter of one of the cops is kidnapped by the gun-toting heavies.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Psychotic LA cop Martin Riggs and his long-suffering partner Roger Murtaugh are assigned to guard an embezzling accountant due to testify before a federal commission. At first, they think it a routine piece of work, but they soon discover that their charge has been laundering money for the same South African narcotics syndicate they have been trying to crack.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3
programme.desc: Murtaugh is only days away from retirement when he and Riggs, along with officer Lorna Cole, are assigned to track down a crooked ex-cop who is supplying huge consignments of guns to gangs.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Detective Riggs and Murtaugh are called into action to foil a Chinese crime lord who is selling immigrants into slavery on American soil. The pair arent as young as they used to be, and ending up on a Triad hit list doesnt make things easy for them either.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: Taxi Driver
programme.desc: New York City cab driver Travis Bickle constantly reflects on the ugly corruption of life around him, and becomes increasingly disturbed over his own loneliness and alienation. In nearly every phase of his life, Bickle remains a complete outsider, failing to make emotional contact with anyone. Unable to sleep night after night, Travis haunts the local pornography emporiums to find diversion.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: A wealthy law student and a lower-class music student meet and fall in love while at Harvard. In the face of parental disapproval, they marry and are blissfully happy, until they discover that she has a fatal disease.

programme.title: Singin in the Rain
programme.desc: When the transition is being made from silent films to `talkies, everyone has trouble adapting. Don and Lina have been cast repeatedly as a romantic couple, but when their latest film is remade into a musical, only Don has the voice for the new singing part. After a lot of practise with a diction coach, Lina still sounds terrible, and Kathy, a bright young aspiring actress, is hired to record over her voice.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: May December
programme.desc: Twenty years after their notorious tabloid romance, a married couple buckle under the pressure when a Hollywood actress meets them to do research for a film about their past.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: When one-time rock hopeful Robbie is jilted at the altar, he vents his bitterness in song, even when singing at other peoples weddings. Only true love can redeem the broken hearted songster but fortunately, hes about to meet a woman who will spin him right round (like a record).

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary
programme.desc: A neurotic thirty-something resolves to take control of her life once and for all. She drinks, smokes and eats too much, and, worst of all, she falls for the wrong kind of man - passing over Mr Right for Mr Right Now. From the novel by Helen Fielding.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridgets brand new relationship with Darcy has taken a plummet due to her jealousy of his workmate. Having previously left the publishing house she worked for to avoid her boss, Daniel, with whom she had an unsuccessful romance, she finds him along for the ride on her new job, which takes her to Thailand, and almost into his arms.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment

programme.title: Risky Business
programme.desc: A normally well-behaved teenager goes wild while his parents are out of town. He takes her in, and, following his schools entrepreneurial teachings, lets her turn the house into a brothel.

programme.title: Wildest New Zealand
programme.desc: In New Zealand, two wild fortresses protect the vulnerable native animals: One a remote island protected by a moat of saltwater, the other a hilltop citadel surrounded by a predator-proof barrier. This is the story of these delicate sanctuaries and the life that thrives within them.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Every empire needs a succession plan. Making babies - and raising them - is crucial for every species to survive. In some social circles, it takes a village to raise a family. In others, a single parent is all that stands between the vulnerability of youth and the threats of the wild.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Once-powerful animal empires like the dinosaurs have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of extinction have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A violent robber makes a mistake when he returns to the scene of his crime, and two wedding venue sculptures seem destined for a permanent honeymoon.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A couple who own a sports club are shocked when they find out why a family friend has been stealing from them. Plus, an antiques thief takes some expensive lamps, but doesnt realise the spotlight is on her.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A ram-raid by a pair of bickering burglars, and a cheeky thief helps himself to two hanging baskets, but the flowers arent the only things coming down: so are his trousers!

programme.title: Rob and Romesh Vs...
programme.desc: Rob and Romesh try to open their own restaurant! In the first of a special two-parter, they learn all about the restaurant industry.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: Suffering from insomnia, Vinnie decides to have a chilled night at the local pub while Kath is away, but things take a sinister turn when a stranger breaks into The Crows Nest.

programme.title: Animals at Play
programme.desc: Animal experts take a look at how different kinds of animals play in the wild, each with their own set of rules.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Moving day arrives for the nursery school kids; Beni gets a beating from a bully; the socialization cage has a new queen; dominant male Pujon is still on a time-out after attacking Alba, but hes allowed a second chance to bond with his rival.

programme.title: Dogs With Extraordinary Jobs
programme.desc: A German shepherd mix and an L.A. firefighter search for mudslide survivors, spaniels search for underground water leaks and a Labrador learns to read.

programme.title: Dogs With Extraordinary Jobs
programme.desc: A blind woman gets a running mate and a pack of dogs protect rhinos in Kenya. Meanwhile, a Border Collie protects visitors in Glacier National Park.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Koala
programme.desc: Koalas live in isolated forests in east and southeast Australia.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Koala
programme.desc: The behaviour of the koala changes dramatically during mating season.

programme.title: Wild Family Ties
programme.desc: As with humans, there are a lot of steps that go into successfully starting a family in the wild, from elaborate courtship techniques to complex mating habits and even lifelong love.

programme.title: Wild Family Ties
programme.desc: The moment that children first face the world can be daunting for baby and parent alike, and families doing their best to survive in the animal kingdom often share similar experiences.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Playful: The animals of Australia work hard to ensure survival. Sometimes working hard isnt always smart. A playful approach can be just as important.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Sinister: Australia has a reputation for the most sinister animals on earth. Behind each sinister trait lies a clever means of survival.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Exploring the stories behind remarkable friendships that have formed between humans and some of the most unlikely animal companions, from a bull that plays football to a mouse family living in an English garden.

programme.title: Shark: British Isles Special with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve explores a world of sharks right on your doorstep. Meet everything from Basking sharks to Angelsharks which have never been filmed before, and discover the threats these sharks face.

programme.title: Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: Taking a journey through the eyes of catfish, ocelots, and other native creatures, celebrating the Lone Star States landscapes and wildlife, and looking at how crucial conservation efforts can save Texas unique habitats.

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Endure winter and early spring on the west coast, where animals eke out a chilly existence. Watch red deer battle on windswept Inishvickillane, welcome seal pups amid howling storms on the Inishkea islands, and view the return of the basking sharks.

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Exploring a 1,500-year-old monastery among the crags of the world-famous Skellig Islands. A look at Manx shearwaters and humpback whales, a chase after pygmy shrews on Clare, and a peek at an autumn spectacle on the Aran Islands.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals: Triumph of the Vertebrates
programme.sub-title: From the Seas to the Skies
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses fossil evidence and CGI to reveal the story of the vertebrates, from their humble origins as the primitive fish that once swam in ancient seas, to their radical move onto land and beyond.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals: Triumph of the Vertebrates
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses fossil evidence and CGI to reveal how mammals developed from tiny forest dwellers to become the dominant life form on the planet.

programme.title: Super Shark Highway
programme.desc: Following the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: Carpathian Predators
programme.desc: During the summer months, a mother brown bear struggles to find food for her two cubs and a pair of lynx kittens venture away from their den; honeybees pollinate flowers.

programme.title: Carpathian Predators
programme.desc: A wolf pack in the Carpathian Mountains raise their young, the red deer rut commences and a fire salamander searches for a place to hibernate.

programme.title: Super Shark Highway
programme.desc: Following the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: Investigating the different reasons that lead animals to face tough disputes.

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: Family is everything, at least to a good number of animals. Many species live in families, clans, or groups. The survival of each individual depends on the family, and the family depends on the union of all its components.

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: A subtropical realm of staggering diversity exists on the eastern coast of Africa. A mangrove forest experiences the high and low tides.

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.sub-title: The Okavango: Lifeblood of the Kalahari
programme.desc: Take a look at one of Africas most abundant and diverse wildlife areas, the Okavango Delta. Investigate the way the delta functions and learn about the variety of interesting species that live in the area.

programme.title: Natures Dress Code: Who Wears What And Why

programme.desc: Ever wonder how closely related humans, monkeys, and apes really are? Visit primate habitats to get an intimate look into their complex societies and observe these intelligent animals loving, working, loafing, fighting, and sharing just like we do.

programme.title: Wild Canary Islands
programme.desc: When rocks engulfed by flames emerge from the middle of the ocean, new opportunities arise for the species that manage to reach them... This is the case of the Canary Islands, eight islands born from fire, that form an archipelago full of life.

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: The Orphans Of Reteti
Becoming Elephant: The Orphans Of Reteti

programme.desc: In oceans, lakes, and rivers, there are underwater war zones. There are also some creatures that have brutal skirmishes above the waves that determine who wins and who dies.

programme.title: Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: David begins his journey inside the magnificent Palm House, a unique global rainforest in London.

programme.title: Kingdom of Plants

programme.title: Kingdom of Plants

programme.desc: The most elemental and pure survival is based on eating. If you are not healthy, strong and agile, you cannot compete to mate, you cannot defend your family from any threat, nor will you be able to achieve good status in your clan.

programme.title: Wild Fighters

programme.title: Tutankhamun Mystery
programme.desc: Nothing before or since has equalled the splendour and magnificence of Tutankhamun but is there a darker secret held within. Narrated by Robert Powell.

programme.title: Britain on Film with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: Amateur filmmakers capture a changing Britain as the nation recovers from war and the economy starts to flourish.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Despite the B52 bombers and the napalm, the USAF raids in Vietnam achieved nothing. Includes a look at President Johnsons daily target selection and covert US bases.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Yakovlev Yak-1 was a Soviet fighter aircraft of World War II. It was a single-seat monoplane with a composite structure and wooden wings and was a fast and competitive fighter aircraft.

programme.title: Battle for the Skies: History of the RAF
programme.sub-title: Useless for the Purposes of War
programme.desc: The definitive film history of the RAF from the early days of the Air Battalion and the Royal Flying Corps right upto its role in the Afghanistan and Iraqi wars.

programme.title: Gladiators of World War II
programme.desc: The Norwegian resistance movement was one of the most effective movements in the whole of occupied Europe, and its activities helped the British to contain - and then destroy - Germanys mightiest warships.

programme.title: Battlefield
programme.desc: Telling the story of the crucial battles for control of the Mediterranean, North Africa, and the irreplaceable oil fields in World War II, as well as the story of the war in Greece.

programme.title: Heroes of World War II
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Designed the Spitfire
programme.desc: Nigel Spivey pays tribute to R J Mitchell, who designed the Spitfire - the jewel in the crown of the RAF during the Second World War. Unfortunately, he died of cancer before seeing the impact his plane made during the conflict.

programme.title: Weapons of World War II
programme.desc: The series on World War II weaponry continues with a look at the development of rockets, especially the German V1 and V2 which terrorised south-east England in 1944.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: Eye-witness accounts and archival footage describe the German U-Boat push into British waters. Features real life stories of bravery and new technologies in the war.

programme.title: WWII: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: New tactics are born in every war, to try to influence the course of battles. Campaigns are waged against non-military targets to ruin morale. Long battles rage throughout the war, from Guadalcanal in the Pacific, to the brutal siege at Leningrad.

programme.title: Secrets of WW2
programme.desc: From the embarrassment of surrender, the French Resistance developed over the course of WWII into an effective and brave fighting force. They played a key role in the liberation of France.

programme.title: Upstairs, Downstairs
programme.desc: Scandal threatens Eaton Place when, after an evening with Sarah at her lodgings, James Bellamy is forced to make a confession to his parents. His words shatter them and alter his own and Sarahs lives.

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: The team are on the hunt for major vehicle thief Jed Wicklow, but when a car chase leads to his death, Gene stands accused of causing it through reckless driving. Alex is adamant that there was something wrong with Jed at the wheel, and wants to prove that the crash was not Genes fault. However, an investigation that has already met with resistance, someone in the police force also appears to be standing in their way.
